summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of BlockQuest homepage restructure. All 19 requested features are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All components have appropriate data-testid attributes for testing
Smooth scrolling working correctly with scrollIntoView API
External links properly configured with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer'
Mobile responsive grid layout correctly configured (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 19 features tested and verified working. Key test results: (1) Hero section with 3 funnel cards - MINI MONEY QUEST, RETRO ARCADE, CHAOS CHRONICLES all visible and clickable, (2) Card links verified - Card 1 goes to future-frontier.vercel.app, Card 2 goes to retro-arcade-v1-2026.vercel.app, Card 3 scrolls to #books-section, (3) Floating goat panel with 4 tabs (Decks/Stories/Videos/Extras) all working, (4) Arcade section has goat intro paragraph, (5) Parent footer has collapsible Parent Hub and Creator Note accordions, Disclaimer always visible, (6) Books section completely unchanged with carousel, characters, tooltips, sparkles, (7) Navigation updated - Home/Arcade/Books/Parents (no Contact), (8) Mobile view stacks cards vertically, hamburger menu works.

tests: 3 funnel cards visible (MINI MONEY QUEST, RETRO ARCADE, CHAOS CHRONICLES)
Floating goat button visible at bottom-right
Decks tab shows 4 slide deck items with download icons
Stories tab shows 'PDFs Coming Soon!' placeholder
Extras tab shows Champion Certificate download
Goat intro paragraph about floating goat visible
Parent Hub collapsible accordion visible and working
Creator Note collapsible accordion visible and working
Trust badges (Safe, Ad-Free, No Real Crypto, Family Friendly) visible
Meet the 5 Friends! section with characters
Character cards grid with all 5 characters (Zara, Sam, Miko, Ollie, Lila)
Book carousel visible with navigation buttons
Floating goat button visible on mobile
